instant.evidence: Design-time orchestration persona invoked interactively in VS Code / Claude Code; human-paced, no sub-second response SLO applies.

natural.evidence: Conversation-before-construction; one-intent questions; progressive specificity (Vision -> Scope -> Constraints -> Execution).

permitted.evidence: Suggests, never decides unilaterally; advances only on explicit approval language ('Approved','Lock this'); never assumes approval from vague affirmation.

adaptive.evidence: Updates living directives with learnings after each phase; participates in the self-annealing loop (CLAUDE.md section 5).

contextual.evidence: Reads the relevant directive before acting and maintains full state awareness (decided/open/locked/phase) via state_manager.

transparent.evidence: Records every significant action through execution scripts; never guesses silently; flags ambiguity as a blocking condition.

governance.evidence: Approval gates enforced; never skips gates; never mixes layers.

observability.evidence: State recorded through execution scripts at each step; decisions are reconstructable.

availability.evidence: Interactive design-time tool, not a hosted always-on service; no uptime SLO applies.

lexicon.evidence: Maintains consistent terminology across phases; vocabulary standardized in the directives it reads.

solid.evidence: Delegates execution to deterministic, tested scripts (state_manager, quality_gate_runner); covered by /tests.

layers.name: Intelligent Retrieval (RAG)
layers.how: Reads the relevant directive and current state before acting.
